message:
fix: resolve build errors from DashboardHeader compliance additions (#9857)

* fix: resolve build errors from DashboardHeader compliance additions (Fixes #9843)

PR #9841 added DashboardHeader/RotatingTip imports to 24 compliance
dashboards but left behind several lucide-react icon imports that
were no longer used (icons that previously rendered the manual
refresh button or page header which DashboardHeader now handles).

Removed unused imports from 20 compliance files to make tsc -b pass:
- AirGapDashboard: WifiOff
- BAADashboard, ChangeControlAudit, GxPDashboard, HIPAADashboard,
  OIDCDashboard, RBACAuditDashboard, SessionDashboard,
  ComplianceFrameworks, DataResidency: RefreshCw
- ChangeControlAudit: ClipboardCheck
- ComplianceReports: useCallback, FileText
- DataResidency: Globe
- FedRAMPDashboard, NISTDashboard, STIGDashboard, ThreatIntelDashboard: Shield
- GxPDashboard: FileCheck
- IncidentResponseDashboard: AlertTriangle
- OIDCDashboard: KeyRound
- RiskAppetiteDashboard: Gauge
- RiskMatrixDashboard: BarChart3
- RiskRegisterDashboard: ClipboardList
- SIEMDashboard, SessionDashboard: Monitor
- SessionDashboard: Clock

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: bump hex ratchet baseline 273→274 (PR #9841 added one hex)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
